disclaimer.cardOne:
### 🧪 Test mode

This AI assistant is currently in **test mode**.  
Answers may be incomplete or _incorrect_.
disclaimer.cardTwo:
### 📚 Legal documents loading

Bot currently trained only on **Labor Code of Uzbekistan**.  
_Other laws not fully loaded or trained._
disclaimer.cardThree:
### ⚖️ Labor questions only

Please ask only **labor-related** questions.  
_Not designed for technical or personal advice._
disclaimer.cardFour:
### 📌 Not official advice

Bot answers provided for **information only**.  
_Cannot replace official legal advice._
